<h1><b>Hi there, I'm </b><a href="https://github.com/williamciva">William Civa</a> <img src="https://media.giphy.com/media/hvRJCLFzcasrR4ia7z/giphy.gif" width="30"></h1>
<br>

<img src = "https://github.com/7oSkaaa/7oSkaaa/blob/main/Images/about_me.gif?raw=true" width = 35>&nbsp;***About me***

<img align="right" width=200px src="https://media1.tenor.com/m/evOjo3SiS1sAAAAd/cat-blink.gif"/>

I hold a degree in **Computer Science** and have a strong interest in **back-end development**, with experience building **REST APIs**.  
I have solid knowledge of **Spring Boot**, **.NET** and relational databases.
I’m also an **Information Security enthusiast**, with a special interest in **penetration testing (pentests)**.  

- 🚀 Always excited to join new projects and take on challenges.  
- ✔ Passionate about sharing knowledge and collaborating with others.  
- 📚 Languages and technologies I work with:  
  - *Java* | *Kotlin* | *C#* 
  - *Spring Boot* | *.NET*
  - *Relational databases*  
- 🎮 Outside of tech, I enjoy playing video games, watching movies/series, traveling, or just relaxing.  
- 📫 Reach out to me at: <a href="william.civa@outlook.com">william.civa@outlook.com</a>
<br>
